vocab.example: As an early bird, I find my brain is most alert right after sunrise.
I’ve never been much of a night owl; I usually crash by 10 PM.
I often wake up at the crack of dawn to get a head start on my studies.

vocab.meaning: Hiệu suất nhận thức đỉnh cao
vocab.example: I schedule my hardest subjects for the morning to utilize my peak cognitive performance.
My productivity levels tend to plummet after a heavy lunch.

vocab.meaning: Sự minh mẫn về đầu óc
vocab.example: The morning silence provides the mental clarity I need for complex problem-solving.
Studying in the afternoon better aligns with my natural circadian rhythm.
I usually hit the books around 2 PM after a quick power nap.
When I study in the afternoon, I really get in the zone and lose track of time.
I feel incredibly sluggish in the morning, so I avoid studying then.

vocab.meaning: Sự trì trệ/uể oải vào buổi chiều
vocab.example: To combat the afternoon slump, I usually switch to lighter tasks like filing.
My mind is as sharp as a tack during the early hours of the day.
It's much easier to absorb information when the house is quiet in the morning.
The morning is the optimal time for me to tackle challenging assignments.

vocab.word: Burn the candle at both ends
vocab.meaning: Làm việc quá sức (thức khuya dậy sớm)
vocab.example: I try not to burn the candle at both ends by keeping a consistent study schedule.
I find that I retain knowledge much better during afternoon sessions.

vocab.meaning: Trạng thái tập trung cực độ
vocab.example: Achieving a state of flow is easier for me when the sun starts to set.
Early morning offers a distraction-free environment for deep work.

vocab.meaning: Giải quyết các tác vụ khó
vocab.example: I prefer the morning to tackle demanding tasks like essay writing.

vocab.meaning: Sự lờ đờ sau khi ăn trưa
vocab.example: I struggle with post-lunch lethargy, making afternoon study difficult.
My brain works at warp speed between 8 AM and 11 AM.

vocab.meaning: Có lợi cho/tạo điều kiện cho
vocab.example: The tranquil morning atmosphere is highly conducive to learning.
By the afternoon, I often suffer from information overload.
I’m usually too groggy in the morning to focus on complex math.
10 AM is my prime time for brainstorming new ideas.

vocab.meaning: Cảm giác đạt được thành tựu
vocab.example: Studying early gives me a sense of accomplishment for the rest of the day.
My concentration span is significantly longer in the afternoon.

vocab.meaning: Nguồn năng lượng mới (sau khi mệt mỏi)
vocab.example: I often get a second wind around 4 PM which helps me finish my work.

vocab.meaning: Một đợt làm việc năng suất
vocab.example: I have a solid bout of productivity every morning before breakfast.
If I study all morning and afternoon, I tend to burn out by evening.

vocab.word: At the top of one's game
vocab.example: I'm at the top of my game when the sun is just coming up.
I wake up feeling fresh as a daisy and ready to hit the books.

vocab.meaning: Sự mơ hồ/mệt mỏi về trí não
vocab.example: I find it hard to clear the mental fog before midday.
Afternoons are reserved for intensive study sessions.
I prefer consistent morning study rather than having to cram in the afternoon.
Morning is the only time I can truly engage in deep work.

vocab.meaning: Vượt qua (một việc khó khăn) bằng nỗ lực
vocab.example: I usually power through my readings during the late afternoon.
By 3 PM, I start feeling the brain drain from a long day.
Caffeine helps boost my alertness during morning study.

vocab.meaning: Người chỉ làm việc hiệu quả buổi sáng
vocab.example: I'm definitely a mornings-only person when it comes to academic rigor.
My thoughts become quite incoherent if I try to study too late in the day.

vocab.meaning: Sự tập trung không gián đoạn
vocab.example: Early morning provides the uninterrupted focus I crave.

vocab.meaning: Chuỗi thời gian làm việc năng suất
vocab.example: I'm currently on a productive streak every afternoon this week.
My interest in studying tends to wane as the afternoon progresses.
My morning routine is starting to bear fruit in my exam grades.
I do all the cognitive heavy lifting before lunch.

vocab.meaning: Mất tập trung/thả hồn treo ngược cành cây
vocab.example: I tend to zone out during afternoon lectures if they are too long.
I feel much more clear-headed after a brisk morning walk.
I prioritize my most difficult modules for the 9 AM slot.
I feel more vibrant and ready to learn in the late afternoon.
